## NYT::NFlow::THeavyHittersSpec {#NYT_NFlow_THeavyHittersSpec}
<!-- This file is generated by yt/yt/flow/tools/generate_yson_struct_doc/generate.sh script -->
<!-- Before using doc generation tool check readme: yt/yt/flow/tools/generate_yson_struct_doc/README.md -->
Source: [yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/common/spec.h]({{source-root}}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/common/spec.h)

#|
|| **Parameter** | **Description** ||
|| `window` | **Type**: [TDuration](./all_yson_structs#TDuration)
**Default value**: `5m`
Time window. ||
|| `threshold` | **Type**: `double`
**Default value**: `0.01`
Keys that appear in the stream more often than `threshold` are considered heavy hitters. The algorithm uses `O(1 / threshold)` memory. ||
|| `limit` | **Type**: `long`
**Default value**: `5`
Maximum number of heavy hitter keys to show. ||
|#
